hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -n "$f" ] || exit 0; case "$f" in *.tex) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; d=$(dirname "$f"); b=$(basename "$f"); if out=$(cd "$d" && latexmk -pdf -interaction=nonstopmode -halt-on-error "$b" 2>&1); then jq -nc --arg m "LaTeX: rendered ${b%.tex}.pdf" '{systemMessage:$m}'; else err=$(printf '%s' "$out" | grep -m1 -A2 "^!" | tr "\n" " " | cut -c1-300); jq -nc --arg m "LaTeX render FAILED for $b: $err" '{systemMessage:$m}'; fi
